programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. The event brings together leading international riders competing in top-level Jumping and Dressage, including Olympic and world champions, highlighting precision, technique, and excellence on one of the sport’s most prestigious stages.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

Marta Ortega Gallego Esp Martina Calvo Esp vs Paula Josemaria Martin Esp Beatriz Gonzalez Fernandez
programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

programme.title: T100 2025 Highlights - Qatar
programme.desc: The Ultimate Pro Triathlon Tour. The 2025 T100 Triathlon World Tour takes the world's best pro triathletes on a globe-trotting adventure of 9 races as they fight it out across a season jam-packed with racing in iconic locations spanning April to December in the battle to be crowned T100 Triathlon World Champion.

programme.title: Gemma TRIAY PONS (ESP) Delfina BREA SENESI (ARG) vs Paula JOSEMARIA MARTIN (ESP) Beatriz GONZALEZ FE
programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

programme.title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco and Rennes have gained more against them over that period. programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.title: Race - F1 China Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends. For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Bayern Munich - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. This will be Stuttgart’s third away trip to Portugal in major European competition, previously drawing 2-2 with Vitória Setúbal in the 1973-74 UEFA Cup and losing 2-1 at Benfica in the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. programme.title: Roma vs Bologna - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Roma have lost just one of their five UEFA Europa League matches against fellow Italian opposition, winning their most recent at home against Milan in the 2023-24 quarter-finals. Bologna have won two of their last three away games against Roma in all competitions, but did lose 1-0 on the opening day of the 2025-26 Serie A season at the Stadio Olimpico.

Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco and Rennes have gained more against them over that period. Nice have picked up 10 points in the 10 Ligue 1 matches since Claude Puel's appointment, which is the same amount as in the last 10 games managed by Franck Haise for les Aiglons in the top-flight.

programme.title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco and Rennes have gained more against them over that period. Nice have picked up 10 points in the 10 Ligue 1 matches since Claude Puel's appointment, which is the same amount as in the last 10 games managed by Franck Haise for les Aiglons in the top-flight.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flight's history. Only Saint-Étienne vs Bordeaux has been played more often in Ligue 1. None of the last 21 matches between Lyon and Monaco in all competitions have ended in a draw. The last draw between the two sides was in October 2015.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Lille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Marseille and Lille will face each other for the 116th time in Ligue 1, making it the joint-fifth most played fixture in the top-flight history. Marseille have won just one of their last 12 games against Lille in all competitions, a 2-1 win in Ligue 1 in September 2022. However, none of those five losses were at home.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flight's history. programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Paris FC have lost just one of their last ten matches in all competitions against Le Havre, a 0-1 loss in Ligue 2 in February 2021. The last three meetings between these two sides have all ended goalless. Le Havre have been involved in the most 0-0 draws in Ligue 1 2025-26. They also recorded more goalless draws than any other team last season.

programme.title: Agustin TAPIA (ARG) Arturo COELLO (ESP) vs Juan LEBRON (ESP) Leandro Roman AUGSBURGER (ARG) - Men -
programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

Al Wakrah vs Al Shamal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Nimes vs Limoges - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: AFC Champions League Elite Finals Jeddah 2026 Draw
programme.desc: Kuala Lumpur, the capital of Malaysia, is in the spotlight as it hosts the draw for the 2026 AFC Champions League finals. This esteemed event is set to occur on Wednesday, March 25, at 10 AM Doha Time, at the headquarters of the Asian Football Confederation. The draw ceremony will determine the pairings from the Quarter-finals to the showdown Final, with all seven single-leg battles to take place between April 16 and 25 in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: This week SoAnne is in Nantes. The football challenge will see 6 children compete on a life-size tic-tac-toe board, coached by Johann Lepenant. Pablo Pagis will answer questions from Maeli and Alana for the locker room interview at FC Lorient, and Sidiki has a wonderful surprise in store for his number one fan.

Pablo Pagis will answer questions from Maeli and Alana for the locker room interview at FC Lorient, and Sidiki has a wonderful surprise in store for his number one fan.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Rennes vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Rennes are on a run of eight consecutive wins against Metz in Ligue 1, their longest streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. Rennes have won six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against teams currently in the bottom half of the table, after failing to win any of their first six this season.

programme.title: Stade Malien (MLI) vs Mamelodi Sundowns FC (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - R16 2ND LEG
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.
